nodes.label: Educational Assortative Mating and Income Inequality among black and white families in the US, 1976-2017
Decomposition of assortative mating effect on inequality into marginal-distribution and pure-assortment components
nodes.rationale: Decomposes the overall impact of assortative mating on income inequality into a component due to changes in the marginal distribution of education and a component due to changes in pure assortative behavior, separately by race, to resolve the puzzling null effect reported in prior literature.
